prompt:
Ultra-realistic luxury fashion campaign poster featuring a young male model with textured wavy hair, sharp jawline, and minimal beard, wearing slim futuristic visor glasses. He stands in a composed yet powerful pose, slightly turned, eyes locked with the camera.

Outfit: oversized matte-finish charcoal techwear trench coat with layered panels, magnetic closures, and subtle reflective piping. Inner layer includes a high-neck tactical knit and structured cargo trousers, creating a futuristic urban silhouette.

Branding elements: subtle co-branded identity of Acronym × Adidas Originals placed minimally on coat sleeve and top corner of composition. Add small futuristic patches, barcodes, and geometric tech symbols for a clean cyber aesthetic.

Composition: medium shot, slightly low angle for dominance, coat flowing and occupying most of the frame with strong structure and depth. Model positioned slightly off-center.

Background: dark gradient concrete wall with neon cyan and white holographic-style typography behind the subject, slightly defocused for depth.

Lighting: cinematic high-contrast lighting with cool cyan and teal tones, combined with a sharp white rim light outlining the coat edges. Subtle reflections enhance the fabric’s technical texture. HDR, ultra-sharp focus, premium editorial finish.

Typography layout:
• Top right: co-branded logos
• Left vertical block: technical product specs text
• Right side: minimal tagline “Engineered for the unseen”
• Bottom: “Urban Tech Capsule” label

Style: futuristic streetwear campaign, cyberpunk editorial, ultra-detailed, 8k resolution, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, clean yet bold composition, modern UI-inspired overlays
